caption: Started my day at 5:47am with 10 minutes of silence. No phone. No coffee yet. Just stillness. Changed how I react to my inbox all day.

Motivation is a lie. I've gone to the gym 312 days in the last year. Felt motivated for maybe 40 of them. The other 272 days? I just went. Didn't feel like it. Went anyway. Systems beat feelings every time.

ChatGPT's Continue where you left off feature breaks after 20 messages. Fix: Use Claude for long coding sessions. I've had single threads go 150+ messages without context loss. Costs $20/month but saves 2 hours per week of reexplaining context.
